title: Integration Options
excerpt: Learn about the different ways to integrate payment methods. You can add or remove payment methods directly from the [Stripe Dashboard](https://dashboard.stripe.com/settings/payment_methods) without writing any code. For example, you can turn on payment methods such as Apple Pay, Klarna, Affirm, iDEAL, and so on. See [Supported payment methods](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/payment-methods/overview.md) to learn more about all the payment methods your integration can support. The [payment methods](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/payment-methods/integration-options.md#payment-method-product-support) you can offer depend on the currency, country, and Stripe products you integrate with.…
